revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Isonokami Faith]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Izumo-taishakyo | title = [[Izumo-taishakyo]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Isonokami.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Ōkuninushi]] * [[Ame no Hohi]] * [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]

}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|建比良鳥命|" to "|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|"
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125475718)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
